title: stachys fontqueri
intro: Stachys fontqueri, also known as Spanish betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family, characterized by its distinctive white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing anxiety and insomnia, and reducing symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Stachys fontqueri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be made into a salve or ointment for topical use.
